patch_title: Patch 7.3 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

new_content.name: Main Scenario Quest: Targeted Tragedy
new_content.description: New main scenario quest following the Warrior of Light aiding Alexandria in the conclusion of the Dawntrail story.

new_content.name: Chronicles of a New Era: Echoes of Vana'diel: Dreams of Paradise
new_content.description: The second installment in the alliance raid series, Echoes of Vana'diel.

new_content.name: New Trial
new_content.description: A new trial has been added.

new_content.name: Vault Oneiron
new_content.description: A new treasure dungeon accessed via Gargantuaskin Treasure Maps, featuring a hypnoslot machine to summon trials or expel players. Requires Disciple of War or Magic level 100, eight players, 60 minutes.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict: Bayside Battleground
new_content.description: A new stage for Crystalline Conflict.

new_content.name: Chat Bubbles
new_content.description: A new refinement and addition to the game.

new_content.name: Portrait Mode for Group Pose
new_content.description: A new refinement and addition to the game.

new_content.name: Duty Support: Cutter's Cry
new_content.description: Duty Support has been added for this dungeon.

new_content.name: Duty Support: The Meso Terminal
new_content.description: Duty Support has been added for this dungeon.

housing.name: FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest Furnishings
housing.description: New furnishings from the FFXIV Furnishing Design Contest 2022, including winning and non-winning entries.

housing.name: New Furnishings
housing.description: Various new furnishings have been added.

housing.name: New Orchestrion Rolls
housing.description: New orchestrion rolls have been added.

housing.name: New Aquarium Fish
housing.description: New aquarium fish have been added.

housing.name: Champa Seeds
housing.description: A new seed for flowerpots, purchasable from Material Suppliers in housing districts and Apartment Merchants.
